穿越综漫世界，东方朔觉醒酒馆委托系统，诸天万界的游客来到酒馆，向他发布委托。
当帝皇看到《达尔文事变》：什么叫人类为什么不能杀了吃肉？
发布任务：杀光类人猿！杀光异形！
当上帝看到美国的亵渎行为：什么叫你们扮成耶稣模样吃孩子？
发布任务：对萝莉岛降下天罚、对美国降下天火、杀尽不义之人。
当赛文看到《庭院两只鸡》：什么叫人类被吃灭绝了？！
发布任务：击杀所有吃人外星种族，拯救剩余人类。
当路基艾尔看到《所有的明天世界》：什么叫你们把人类停留在永远痛苦的时间？！
发布任务：杀光qu，恢复人类躯体
赤瞳：推翻腐朽帝国
虎杖：杀光所有咒灵
在电锯人杀光碍人蛆恶魔，在FATE杀死碍人蛆老所长，在明日方舟打爆吃人大地，在崩坏三肘击崩坏意志，在战锤里干翻所有邪神……
总之，这是个随心所欲、为所欲为的主角消灭所有碍人蛆的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6ffe566e703523d308ead46c520a0a82~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"EVOIIOVE","author_id":"","book_id":"7606580775785352254","book_name":"综漫：碍人王太多怎么办？只有杀","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#784010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606885903935488537","read_count":"50600","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"235304"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"82","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,多女主,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6ffe566e703523d308ead46c520a0a82~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382344&x-signature=GGl94ys5ndd9cunYG7SqFY8YBEA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1146170527449843","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005224C54D20B61D847661D04B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"
